locations.name: 平均海拔
locations.summary: 平均海拔（英語：Above mean sea level，缩写：AMSL）又称为海拔高度，是指以平均海平面高度作为高程基准面起测定的地面或空中高度，对地理测量，飞行控制，电台设定，气象研究都有决定性作用。 所谓平均海平面高度实际是并不存在…

locations.name: 南美洲
locations.summary: 南亚美利加洲（英语：South America），简称南美洲，为七大洲之一，位於西半球南部（或南半球），西臨南太平洋，西面為太平洋板塊及納斯卡板塊。太平洋板塊及納斯卡板塊之間的內營力為張力，衍生了東太平洋海嶺；而納斯卡板塊與南美洲板塊的內…

relations.subject: Ruddy pigeon
relations.evidence: subvinacea. thumb|left In Central America it is found in highland forest canopy and semi-open woodland from 1500 m (5000 ft) ASL to the timberline

relations.subject: Ruddy pigeon
relations.evidence: In South America it occurs in the canopy of humid forest from near sea-level to 1500 m (5000 ft) ASL, occasionally higher; exceptionally, they may range up to 3000 m ASL or more.Krabbe, Niels; Flórez, Pablo; Suárez, Gustavo; Castaño, José; Arango, Juan David & Duque, Arley (2006) The birds of Páramo de Frontino, western Andes of Colombia

relations.subject: Ruddy pigeon
relations.evidence: PDF fulltext It is not uncommon across its wide range but due to projected deforestation is thus classified as a Least Concern species by the IUCN. It is normally seen in pairs as it forages in the tree tops for fruits and berries—being particularly fond of mistletoe fruit – but may occasionally be seen on tracks and roadside seeking grit
